assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 6-8 show the JQL query: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Both required labels are present as AND conditions.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 19-21 under 'Stream Filtering': "Current issue stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.1] -> stream name rhtpa-2.1" and "TC-8022 summary contains (rhtpa-2.1) -> matches the current issue's stream". The output explicitly checks the task summary for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 38-43 show: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: "Depend"). Also confirmed in the Issue Link Summary (line 83): "Depend -> TC-8022 (remediation task, now standard)".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 49-58 show current labels including 'security-preemptive' and updated labels without it. The jira.edit_issue call on TC-8022 sets labels to ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"] (security-preemptive removed). Line 60 explains: "It is no longer a preemptive task -- it is a standard remediation task."

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md lines 72-73: "Because Step 4.4 recorded that remediation already exists for stream 2.1.x (via TC-8022), Step 8 (Remediation) skipped task creation for this stream entirely." Also reconciliation.md line 73: "Skipping new remediation task creation in Step 8" and line 78: "Step 8 will skip task creation for this stream."
